perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a colorful title card featuring a cartoon character and large text announcing Costco's weekly specials from 12/01 to 12/07. (2) It transitions into a rapid-fire sequence of shots inside a Costco warehouse, showing various products like packaged pork, laundry detergent, snacks, and jerky. (3) Each shot focuses on a specific item, often displayed in bulk on shelves or in refrigerated sections, with consistent text overlays indicating pricing and discounts. (4) The camera moves quickly from one product to another, covering groceries, household items, beverages, and electronics like headphones.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic male voice immediately starts speaking at a very fast pace, introducing the shopping report. Fast-tempo electronic background music starts playing simultaneously. (2) As the narrator lists each product and its price, the audio is a continuous stream of rapid speech synced with the visual cuts. (3) No ambient warehouse noise is audible as the studio-quality voiceover and background music dominate the soundscape. (4) The audio concludes with a brief call to action as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'COSTCO 每週特價速報 12/01-12/07 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Weekly Special Report 12/01-12/07 Remember to follow us) in a bold, variety-show style. (2) Functional text on every slide: Includes product names like '進口冷凍豬梅花火鍋片', '橘子工坊除臭酵素洗衣精', and 'JACK LINK'S 煙燻原味牛肉乾'. (3) Pricing details: '原價' (Original price), discount amount (e.g., '-80'), and '特價' (Special price) are displayed for each item. (4) Time constraints: '特價至 12/05' appears on specific items to denote limited-time offers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price showcase -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The narrator is off-screen; approximately 3-4 shoppers are visible in the background aisles or from the back.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various aisles and sections within a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving, refrigerated display cases, and pallets of bulk goods.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Categorized Promotion List -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a weekly promotional guide for Costco Taiwan members. It utilizes a high-energy vocal delivery and rapid editing to condense a large amount of pricing information into a short duration, aiming to drive store traffic and social media engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video directly showcases product prices, discounts, and the Costco brand, serving as a clear promotional endorsement for the retailer and the featured brands.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed machine-gun narration and standardized price-tag graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is tailored for short-form video platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, prioritizing information density and speed over cinematic storytelling.
